summary: Lush audience recording with clear, pleasant sound; performance details are minimal.
review: The taper captured a nicely balanced and lush audience mix, even picking up a humorous little dispute at the start of Terrapin Station. No specific musical critiques were offered, so the show itself remains largely unassessed beyond the decent audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, which praises the recording (good audience sound) but provides no insight into the musical performance; thus rating leans toward a solid but not outstanding overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Lush, clear AUD recording; minor background dispute captured at the start of Terrapin Station but otherwise clean.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or performance quality were made.
